lessons.name: Unit 11: Science and Technology
lessons.description: Learn about science and technology with reported speech (statements).

sections.heading: 1. Từ vựng (Vocabulary)
sections.content:
Science fields: biology, chemistry, physics, astronomy, genetics, robotics

Technology: invention, innovation, discovery, experiment, research, laboratory, scientist, engineer

Devices: robot, drone, 3D printer, smart device, wearable technology

sections.heading: 2-12. Các phần còn lại
sections.content: Luyện tập từ vựng, Ngữ âm, Ngữ pháp, Getting Started, A Closer Look 1-2, Communication, Skills 1-2, Looking Back, Project

sections.heading: 3. Ngữ pháp (Grammar)
sections.content:
Reported Speech - Statements (Câu tường thuật - Câu trần thuật)

A. Cấu trúc:

  • S + said (that) + S + V (lùi thì)
  • S + told + O + (that) + S + V (lùi thì)

B. Quy tắc lùi thì:

  • Present Simple → Past Simple
  • Ex: "I like science." → He said (that) he liked science.
  • Present Continuous → Past Continuous
  • Ex: "I am studying." → She said (that) she was studying.
  • Past Simple → Past Perfect
  • Ex: "I went there." → He said (that) he had gone there.
  • Will → Would
  • Ex: "I will help." → She said (that) she would help.
  • Can → Could
  • Ex: "I can do it." → He said (that) he could do it.

C. Thay đổi đại từ và trạng từ:

  • I → he/she
  • we → they
  • my → his/her
  • here → there
  • now → then
  • today → that day
  • tomorrow → the next day
  • yesterday → the day before

D. Said vs Told:

  • Said: không có tân ngữ
  • Ex: He said (that) he was tired.
  • Told: có tân ngữ
  • Ex: He told me (that) he was tired.

problemTypes.name: Dạng 1: Lùi thì Present → Past
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Present Simple → Past Simple
  • Present Continuous → Past Continuous
  • Thay đổi đại từ

examples.question: "I am studying." → She said ______.
examples.explanation: am studying → was studying; I → she

problemTypes.name: Dạng 2: Lùi thì với Will/Can
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Will → Would
  • Can → Could
  • Thay đổi đại từ và trạng từ

examples.question: "I will help you." → She said ______.
examples.explanation: will → would; I → she; you → me

examples.question: "We will come tomorrow." → They said ______.
examples.solution: They said (that) they would come the next day.
examples.explanation: will → would; We → they; tomorrow → the next day

problemTypes.name: Dạng 3: Said vs Told
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Said: không có tân ngữ
  • Told + tân ngữ (me, him, her, us, them)

examples.question: "I am tired." → He ______ (that) he was tired.
"I am tired." → He ______ me (that) he was tired.
"I like robots." → She ______ us (that) she liked robots.

problemTypes.name: Dạng 4: Thay đổi trạng từ thời gian/nơi chốn
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • here → there
  • now → then
  • today → that day
  • tomorrow → the next day
  • yesterday → the day before

examples.question: "I will come tomorrow." → She said ______.
examples.solution: She said (that) she would come the next day.

examples.question: "I saw him yesterday." → He said ______.
examples.solution: He said (that) he had seen him the day before.
examples.explanation: saw → had seen; yesterday → the day before

exercises.question: "I like science." → He said he ______ science.
"I am studying." → She said she ______ studying.
"I will help." → She said she ______ help.
"I can do it." → He said he ______ do it.
"I am tired." → He ______ he was tired.
"I am tired." → He ______ me he was tired.
"I am here." → He said he was ______.
"I will come tomorrow." → She said she would come ______.
"We love robots." → They said they ______ robots.
"I saw him yesterday." → He said he ______ him the day before.
Which are correct reported speech transformations? (Select all that apply)
options: "I like it." → He said he liked it.
"I will go." → She said she would go.
"I can help." → He said he can help.
"I am here." → She said she was there.
exercises.explanation: Đúng: liked, would go, was there. Sai: can → could (không phải can)

exercises.question: Which time expressions change in reported speech? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: tomorrow, yesterday, now đều thay đổi. 'always' không đổi.

exercises.question: Which sentences use 'told' correctly? (Select all that apply)
options: He told me he was tired.
She told that she liked it.
They told us they would come.
I told him I could help.
exercises.explanation: told + tân ngữ. Câu 2 sai vì 'told that' (thiếu tân ngữ).

exercises.question: Transform: "I like science." → He said ______.
exercises.answer: he liked science / (that) he liked science

exercises.question: Transform: "I will help you." → She told me ______.
exercises.answer: she would help me / (that) she would help me
exercises.explanation: will → would; I → she; you → me

exercises.question: Transform: "I am here now." → He said ______.
exercises.answer: he was there then / (that) he was there then
exercises.explanation: am → was; here → there; now → then

exercises.question: Choose: He ______ (said/told) me he was tired.
Transform to reported speech: "I love technology. I study it every day." (He said...)
exercises.sample_answer: He said (that) he loved technology. He said (that) he studied it every day.
exercises.explanation: love → loved; study → studied; I → he

exercises.question: Transform to reported speech: "I will invent a robot. I can do it." (She told me...)
exercises.sample_answer: She told me (that) she would invent a robot. She told me (that) she could do it.
exercises.explanation: will → would; can → could; I → she; told + me

exercises.question: Rearrange and transform: said / He / he / liked / science / . / told / She / me / she / studying / was / .
exercises.sample_answer: He said he liked science. She told me she was studying.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: said (không tân ngữ); told me (có tân ngữ)

exercises.question: Transform: "I am working here now. I will finish tomorrow." (He said...)
exercises.sample_answer: He said (that) he was working there then. He said (that) he would finish the next day.
exercises.explanation: am working → was working; here → there; now → then; will → would; tomorrow → the next day

exercises.question: Transform and combine: "I like robots." + "I will buy one tomorrow." (She told us... Use 'and')
exercises.sample_answer: She told us (that) she liked robots and (that) she would buy one the next day.
exercises.explanation: like → liked; will buy → would buy; tomorrow → the next day; kết hợp bằng 'and'
